command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4N5hTKUqkKVKapg.d5b2b277a65e --database 6QhAyfvWVgMWYWiBVkrTMQ --execute 
ALTER TABLE ail_org_context
  ADD COLUMN wont_do_json TEXT NULL COMMENT 'JSON: string[] — LLM-generated out-of-scope items',
  ADD COLUMN provenance_json TEXT NULL COMMENT 'JSON: provenance map for cost/risk/vision sources',
  ADD COLUMN library_version VARCHAR(20) NULL COMMENT 'content library version used when strategy was generated';

ALTER TABLE strategy_risk_register
  ADD COLUMN source_rule_id VARCHAR(100) NULL COMMENT 'content library risk rule ID that triggered this entry';
